title: Buttery Silky Lazy Sunday Mozzarella Stir-fry
description: A nutritious and comforting Norweigan-inspired dish featuring mozzarella cheese cooked in a buttery, silky sauce for an easy weekday meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add butter and melt.
Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in milk and stir to combine with butter mixture. Allow it to come to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, add salt and pepper to taste. Stir occasionally for 5 minutes to thicken the sauce slightly.
Fold grated mozzarella into the sauce while stirring gently. Let cook until cheese is fully melted and sauce has thickened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add cherry tomatoes and stir again. Cook for an additional minute to meld flavors together.
Serve hot over cooked noodles or as a side dish with grilled meats.
